omnibar_menuTitle.title: Search
omnibar_menuTitle.description: Title of the omnibar widget in the customizer panel.

omnibar_aiChatFormPlaceholder.title: Ask anything privately
omnibar_aiChatFormPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the AI chat input field.

omnibar_aiChatFormSubmitButtonLabel.title: Send
omnibar_aiChatFormSubmitButtonLabel.description: Accesible label for the AI chat submit button.

omnibar_aiChatFormVoiceButtonLabel.title: Start voice chat
omnibar_aiChatFormVoiceButtonLabel.description: Accessible label for the voice-chat button shown in place of the AI chat submit button when the input is empty and the feature is enabled.

omnibar_logoAlt.title: DuckDuckGo
omnibar_logoAlt.description: Alt text for the DuckDuckGo logo.

omnibar_tabSwitcherLabel.title: Search & Duck.ai tab switcher
omnibar_tabSwitcherLabel.description: Accessible label for the tab switcher between search and AI modes.

omnibar_aiTabLabel.title: Duck.ai
omnibar_aiTabLabel.description: Label for the AI chat tab.

omnibar_searchFormPlaceholder.title: Search privately
omnibar_searchFormPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input field.

omnibar_searchFormCloseButtonLabel.title: Close
omnibar_searchFormCloseButtonLabel.description: Accessible label for the close button in the search form.

omnibar_toggleDuckAi.title: Duck.ai
omnibar_toggleDuckAi.description: Label for the button to toggle the Duck.ai chat interface.

omnibar_searchDuckDuckGoSuffix.title: Search DuckDuckGo
omnibar_searchDuckDuckGoSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will search DuckDuckGo.

omnibar_duckDuckGoSuffix.title: DuckDuckGo
omnibar_duckDuckGoSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will open a DuckDuckGo page.

omnibar_visitSuffix.title: Visit {url}
omnibar_visitSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will open a webpage.

omnibar_askDuckAiSuffix.title: Ask Duck.ai
omnibar_askDuckAiSuffix.description: Text placed after aiChat suggestions that will submit a chat query.

omnibar_switchToTab.title: Switch to Tab
omnibar_switchToTab.description: Badge text shown next to open tab suggestions.

omnibar_customizePopoverTitle.title: Toggle between search and AI chat
omnibar_customizePopoverTitle.description: Title for the popover that introduces the search/AI toggle feature.

omnibar_customizePopoverDescription.title:
Either way, your info stays private.
Don't want this?
omnibar_customizePopoverDescription.description: Description message in the popover including privacy statement and customize option.

omnibar_attachImageLabel.title: Add Images
omnibar_attachImageLabel.description: Label for the attach-image entry — both the standalone paperclip button (aria-label) and the menu item in the combined attach dropdown.

omnibar_removeImageLabel.title: Remove image
omnibar_removeImageLabel.description: Accessible label for the button to remove an attached image thumbnail.

omnibar_modelSelectorLabel.title: Select model
omnibar_modelSelectorLabel.description: Accessible label for the AI model selector dropdown.

omnibar_imageAttachmentLimitWarning.title: You can only attach {limit} images at a time.
omnibar_imageAttachmentLimitWarning.description: Warning shown when user attaches more images than the allowed maximum.

omnibar_fileAttachmentLimitWarning.title: You can only attach {limit} files at a time.
omnibar_fileAttachmentLimitWarning.description: Warning shown when user attaches more files than the allowed maximum.

omnibar_imageTooLargeError.title: Image is too large. Please use an image smaller than 10000×10000 pixels.
omnibar_imageTooLargeError.description: Error shown when a user tries to attach an image that exceeds the maximum pixel dimensions.

omnibar_fileTooLargeError.title: File is too large. Please use a file smaller than {limit} MB.
omnibar_fileTooLargeError.description: Error shown when a user tries to attach a file that exceeds the maximum allowed size. {limit} is the size limit in megabytes.

omnibar_imageProcessingError.title: Failed to process image. Please try a different file.
omnibar_imageProcessingError.description: Error shown when an attached image cannot be processed.

omnibar_advancedModelsSectionHeader.title: Advanced Models - DuckDuckGo subscription
omnibar_advancedModelsSectionHeader.description: Section header in the model picker for premium models that require a subscription.

omnibar_viewAllChats.title: View all chats
omnibar_viewAllChats.description: Link text to view all AI chat history.

omnibar_openDuckAi.title: Open Duck.ai
omnibar_openDuckAi.description: Link text to open the Duck.ai chat interface.

omnibar_createImageLabel.title: Create Image
omnibar_createImageLabel.description: Label for the toggle button to enable image generation mode in the AI chat toolbar.

omnibar_imageGenerationPlaceholder.title: Describe the image you want to create
omnibar_imageGenerationPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the AI chat input when image generation mode is active.

omnibar_toolsMenuLabel.title: Tools
omnibar_toolsMenuLabel.description: Accessible label for the tools menu button in the AI chat toolbar.

omnibar_createImageDescription.title: Turn text into images
omnibar_createImageDescription.description: Description for the Create Image tool shown in the tools menu dropdown.

omnibar_webSearchLabel.title: Web Search
omnibar_webSearchLabel.description: Label for the Web Search tool shown in the tools menu dropdown.

omnibar_webSearchDescription.title: Source answers from the web
omnibar_webSearchDescription.description: Description for the Web Search tool shown in the tools menu dropdown.

omnibar_customizeResponsesLabel.title: Customize Responses
omnibar_customizeResponsesLabel.description: Label for the Customize Responses entry shown in the tools menu dropdown. Selecting it opens a modal to control how Duck.ai responds.

omnibar_customizeResponsesDescription.title: Control tone, length, and more
omnibar_customizeResponsesDescription.description: Description for the Customize Responses entry shown in the tools menu dropdown.

omnibar_customizeResponsesToggleLabel.title: Apply response customization
omnibar_customizeResponsesToggleLabel.description: Accessible label for the on/off toggle that applies or unapplies the saved response customization, shown on the Customize Responses tools menu row.

omnibar_imageGenerationWithAttachmentPla.title: Describe changes based on the image
omnibar_imageGenerationWithAttachmentPla.description: Placeholder text for the AI chat input when image generation mode is active and an image is attached.

omnibar_reasoningPickerLabel.title: Reasoning
omnibar_reasoningPickerLabel.description: Accessible label (and chip text) for the reasoning-effort picker in the AI chat toolbar.

omnibar_reasoningEffortFastLabel.title: Fast
omnibar_reasoningEffortFastLabel.description: Label for the 'fast' reasoning-effort option (answers right away, no deliberate reasoning).

omnibar_reasoningEffortFastDescription.title: Answers right away
omnibar_reasoningEffortFastDescription.description: Subtitle for the 'fast' reasoning-effort option in the reasoning picker dropdown.

omnibar_reasoningEffortReasoningLabel.title: Reasoning
omnibar_reasoningEffortReasoningLabel.description: Label for the 'reasoning' reasoning-effort option (model spends a moment reasoning).

omnibar_reasoningEffortReasoningDescript.title: Takes a moment to respond
omnibar_reasoningEffortReasoningDescript.description: Subtitle for the 'reasoning' reasoning-effort option in the reasoning picker dropdown.

omnibar_reasoningEffortExtendedReasoning.title: Extended Reasoning
omnibar_reasoningEffortExtendedReasoning.description: Label for the 'extended reasoning' reasoning-effort option (model researches before responding).

omnibar_reasoningEffortExtendedReasoning.title: Researches before responding
omnibar_reasoningEffortExtendedReasoning.description: Subtitle for the 'extended reasoning' reasoning-effort option in the reasoning picker dropdown.

omnibar_attachMenuLabel.title: Add Attachment
omnibar_attachMenuLabel.description: Accessible label for the paperclip button that opens a menu offering image attachments and tab content attachments.

omnibar_attachImageOrFileLabel.title: Add Images or PDFs
omnibar_attachImageOrFileLabel.description: Label for the attach entry when the active model accepts both images and PDFs — covers the menu item in the combined dropdown and the standalone paperclip button's aria-label.

omnibar_attachFileLabel.title: Add PDFs
omnibar_attachFileLabel.description: Label for the attach-PDF entry — both the standalone paperclip button (aria-label) and the menu item in the combined attach dropdown.

omnibar_removeAttachedFileLabel.title: Remove {fileName}
omnibar_removeAttachedFileLabel.description: Accessible label for the button that removes an attached file chip from the AI chat input. {fileName} is the original filename.

omnibar_attachPageContentLabel.title: Add Page Content
omnibar_attachPageContentLabel.description: Menu item in the attach dropdown that opens the open-tabs picker so the user can attach extracted page content.

omnibar_attachTabsPickerTitle.title: Tabs
omnibar_attachTabsPickerTitle.description: Header text for the open-tabs picker panel.

omnibar_attachTabsPickerLabel.title: Pick an open tab to add
omnibar_attachTabsPickerLabel.description: Accessible label for the open-tabs picker panel (the dialog wrapper around the listbox).

omnibar_attachTabsNoMatches.title: No matching tabs
omnibar_attachTabsNoMatches.description: Empty-state message shown in the @-mention tab picker when no open tabs match what the user typed.

omnibar_attachTabsNoOpenTabs.title: No page content available
omnibar_attachTabsNoOpenTabs.description: Empty-state message shown in the attach-page-content tabs dropdown when there is no page content available to attach.

omnibar_removeAttachedTabLabel.title: Remove {title}
omnibar_removeAttachedTabLabel.description: Accessible label for the close button on an attached-tab chip. {title} is the tab title.

omnibar_removeSuggestion.title: Remove from browsing history
omnibar_removeSuggestion.description: Accessible label and tooltip for the button that removes a search suggestion from browsing history.

omnibar_removeAiChat.title: Delete this chat
omnibar_removeAiChat.description: Accessible label and tooltip for the button that deletes a recent AI chat.
